rules.title: MFA must be enabled
rules.description: MFA must be enabled for user authentication that can access ePHI.

rules.title: Encryption at rest must be enabled
rules.description: Data at rest encryption should be enabled for systems storing ePHI.

rules.title: TLS must be enabled for data in transit
rules.description: TLS must protect ePHI in transit across networks.

rules.title: Audit logging must be enabled
rules.description: Systems handling ePHI must produce auditable logs.

rules.title: Audit logs must retain at least 180 days
rules.description: Minimum retention baseline for auditability is 180 days.
